data.title: As a skill orchestrator, I want using-lockpick/SKILL.md to document the kudos system triggers, point mechanics, and contributor ranks
data.description:
As a skill orchestrator, I need using-lockpick/SKILL.md to document the kudos system so that session orchestrators understand what behaviors are recognized and rewarded, enabling deliberate quality-seeking strategies.

DONE DEFINITIONS:
- using-lockpick/SKILL.md gains a ## Kudos System Awareness section at the end of the file
- Section includes: (1) active trigger list (all triggers from Epic 1 T3-T15 plus Epic 2 T1/T2/T4), reflecting actual implemented triggers after K, L, and Epic 1 Story C are complete; (2) point display format per commit (from Epic 1 Story A ledger output); (3) jitter interpretation: Award = BasePoints x 1/(n+1) x jitter_factor [0.8, 1.2], where n = prior session entries for this trigger; (4) contributor rank thresholds from Epic 1
- Section written ONLY after K, L, and Epic 1 Story C (8d6e-b6f0) are complete — content reflects actual implementation, not speculation
- Done definition: section accurately lists only triggers that are actually implemented and shipped

CONSIDERATIONS:
- [Sequence] N depends on M (agent contracts), K (T1/T2 triggers), L (T4 trigger), and Epic 1 Story C (shell triggers T6/T9/T12) to ensure the active trigger list is complete and accurate
- [Safeguard] using-lockpick/SKILL.md is in plugins/dso/skills/ — may be a safeguard file; task descriptions must explicitly name it
